productDisplayName: French Connection Men Navy Blue Check Shirt
description: Style Note french connection knows how to make a statement in style. Make one of chilled out ease with this checked shirt. Get the right look by wearing it with a pair of form fitting jeans and leather shoes on your evening out. Product Details Blue and white checked shirt, has a buttoned down collar, full buttoned placket, short sleeves with mid button tab and a curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Wash with similar colours Iron on reverse side Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size S
